plugins.name: ielts-reading-review
plugins.description: IELTS Academic Reading review skill — per-question error analysis, synonym tracking, vocabulary tagging (538 keywords + COCA 5000), recurring mistake detection, professional HTML review notes with PDF export. 雅思阅读复盘助手：错题拆解、同义替换积累、考点词标注、易错模式追踪。
